title: Top 10 Movies 2025 Box Office Collection | Highest Grossing Films
text:
Top 10 highest-grossing movies of 2025 based on box office data:

Based on the box office data provided, here are the top 10 films by worldwide gross collection in 2025:

1. Dhurandhar (Bollywood) - ₹1,307.35 Crores WW Gross
2. Kantara: A Legend Chapter-1 (Sandalwood) - ₹852.36 Crores WW Gross
3. Chhaava (Bollywood) - ₹807.91 Crores WW Gross
4. Saiyaara (Bollywood) - ₹570.33 Crores WW Gross
5. Coolie (Kollywood) - ₹518.00 Crores WW Gross
6. War 2 (Bollywood) - ₹364.35 Crores WW Gross
7. Mahavatar Narsimha (Sandalwood) - ₹326.82 Crores WW Gross
8. Avatar: Fire and Ash (Hollywood) - ₹13,885.00 Crores WW Gross
9. They Call Him OG (Tollywood) - ₹295.22 Crores WW Gross
10. Sankranthiki Vasthunam (Tollywood) - ₹255.48 Crores WW Gross

The data shows Dhurandhar as the highest-grossing Indian film at ₹1,307.35 crores worldwide. Avatar: Fire and Ash achieved exceptional global performance with ₹13,885 crores (approximately $1.66 billion USD), demonstrating the continued strength of Hollywood blockbusters in the Indian market alongside strong Bollywood performance.
